name: Gagaga Academy Emergency Network
name_jp: ガガガ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>学</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>園</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>緊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>急</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>連</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>絡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>網</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters: Special Summon 1 "Gagaga" monster from your Deck. You cannot Special Summon any other monsters, except by Xyz Summon, during the turn you activate this card. You can only activate 1 "Gagaga Academy Emergency Network" per turn.
eff: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters: Special Summon 1 "Gagaga" monster from your Deck. You cannot Special Summon any other monsters, except by Xyz Summon, during the turn you activate this card. You can only activate 1 "Gagaga Academy Emergency Network" per turn.
